page: Amazon Web Services c8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture compute-optimized server instance powered by Intel processors. It features 8 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) derived from 4 physical cores, with 2 threads per core running at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, which minimizes virtualization overhead. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached Elastic Block Store (EBS) volumes. The instance is network and EBS optimized, offering a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU hardware.

The c8ine.2xlarge is positioned as a compute-optimized resource with a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This resource density makes it qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage. Tradeoffs include the complete reliance on network storage and the lack of hardware acceleration. Suitable workloads include batch processing, distributed analytics, web serving, and compute-intensive applications.
description: Amazon Web Services c8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance powered by Intel processors. Running on the Nitro hypervisor, it features 8 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores with a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage. It offers a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. The c8ine.2xlarge is designed for compute-heavy workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but have modest memory requirements, such as batch processing, web serving, and distributed analytics. Its lack of local storage and hardware acceleration represents a tradeoff for workloads requiring high-speed local I/O or graphics processing.
og_description: Amazon Web Services c8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 8 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 16.0 GB of RAM, and 12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services c8ine.2xlarge is an Intel-powered, compute-optimized server with 8 vCPUs, 16.0 GB RAM, and 12 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: An Intel-powered, compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated vCPUs, balanced network performance, and a lean memory footprint for compute-heavy workloads.
bullet_points: Intel x86_64 architecture with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores
16.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
12 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor optimization
No local storage, requiring network-attached EBS volumes
Designed for compute-intensive workloads, batch processing, and web serving
